title: Doujin Requests Recommendations Discussion etc
wikitext:
[]: Doujin Requests/Recommendations/Discussion etc             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 2:37 am Hello Good Mams and Sirs, I want to share my favorite Non H-Doujins with you. These are mostly all Shinji/Asuka related though Rei and Misato (Mari too) are in some of them, I will be posting them throughout the next few days, the art inside each of these should either range from satisfying to great. These are sweet, romantic, sometimes depressing and/or funny so please enjoy. We can also talk about purely H doujins too though we can not post links, I am willing to discuss and recommend some though. In fact the first H doujin I want to recommend for all Asuka/Shinji fans is Suki , it's very romantic. It takes place a while after EoE and Shinji finally (once again) tells Asuka that he loves her but this time she doesn't reject him, it's totally WAFFy. I feel it to be the best Asuka/Shinji doujin outside of Re-Take ever. Shinji and Asuka and a Hot Day Tenohirano Adolescense Tenohirano Adolescence 2 Fortissimo SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Doujin Requests/Recommendations/Discussion etc             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Fri Apr 18, 2014 3:13 am Oh joy, I can really get behind this topic. Gimme a day or two and I'll see what I can contribute (just after I compile a list of H-content stories and links to the non-H ones). Fortissimo SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Doujin Requests/Recommendations/Discussion etc             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 3:23 am AngelNo13Bardiel wrote: Oh joy, I can really get behind this topic. Gimme a day or two and I'll see what I can contribute (just after I compile a list of H-content stories and links to the non-H ones). SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Apr 18, 2014 5:41 am Hey, guys... why don't you talk about WHY you recommend them, not just list them? Make sure this is a discussion, not a catalog.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Fri Apr 18, 2014 6:50 am Wait... Videos? There are fan-made A/S H videos ?! Also more than a little creepy that ASH (presumably standing for A/S H) = name of Bardiel's girlfriend.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 8:23 am Monk Ed wrote: Wait... Videos? There are fan-made A/S H videos ?! Also more than a little creepy that ASH (presumably standing for A/S H) = name of Bardiel's girlfriend.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Fri Apr 18, 2014 1:58 pm Maybe just recommend ONE item per post, and do so with some degree of detail. Like what we have going on in the anime recommendations thread .

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 2:06 pm NemZ wrote: Maybe just recommend ONE item per post, and do so with some degree of detail. Like what we have going on in the anime recommendations thread .

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 18, 2014 4:07 pm Monk Ed wrote: Wait... Videos? There are fan-made A/S H videos ?

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 4:10 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: There's also a sweet H video of Asuka and Shinji in place of beginning EoE events, but it's the same video as some creepy Asuka (or Rei?) tentacle or rape crap at the start. Innocent end screencap here:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Apr 18, 2014 4:20 pm No idea, but those 2 WAFF-H games I mentioned can probably be found if you search in the right places (THAT BOARD, Google, etc).

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Fri Apr 18, 2014 9:44 pm Is there seriously an H doujin thread on evageeks? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 9:57 pm Clover wrote: Is there seriously an H doujin thread on evageeks? SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Fri Apr 18, 2014 9:58 pm ChaddyManPrime wrote: I'm still recovering from Eden bro, I'll never forgive them for the character assassination of Asuka. I can't believe they're the same artists who do the Confusion series. I will not be reading any Rei related doujins any time soon...okay maybe that's not true especially if it's Asuka, Rei, and Shinji, I can accept them as a OT3.

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Fri Apr 18, 2014 10:02 pm Clover wrote: You actually read them?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Fri Apr 18, 2014 11:51 pm First dojin that came to mind when I saw mention of recommending something H is WC or Wet Children by pinvise and Suzutsuki Kurara. Mari x Shinji x Asuka shenanigans. Aside from the shenanigans, I like the artwork in this one. B&W but the characters are drawn really well. One of my favorites is a non H Rei panel:

Mari x Shinji x Asuka shenanigans. Aside from the shenanigans, I like the artwork in this one. B&W but the characters are drawn really well. One of my favorites is a non H Rei panel:

[]:             Quote Post by ChaddyManPrime » Sat Apr 19, 2014 1:13 am Monk Ed wrote: You say that like you don't already know the wide variety of what I'm into. So you don't even have the name of this video?

[]:             Quote Post by AngelNo13Bardiel » Sat Apr 19, 2014 6:17 am ^ I've seen that one too, but I can't remember the title for the life of me. Shame it began with tentacles as well, those are...not my thing at all. Monk Ed wrote: Also more than a little creepy that ASH (presumably standing for A/S H) = name of Bardiel's girlfriend.
